title: Meg Ryan and Billy Crystal reunite for ‘When Harry Met Sally’ Super Bowl 2025 ad

sentences.en: I can't believe they let us back in this place.
sentences.ko: 이곳에 다시 들어오게 해줄 줄은 몰랐어.

sentences.en: Something wrong? Not doing it. No good? Nothing.
sentences.ko: 무슨 문제 있어? 안 할 거야. 별로야? 아무것도 아니야.

sentences.en: Oh my God. Oh boy. So good!
sentences.ko: 오 마이 갓. 아이고. 너무 맛있어!

sentences.en: This one's real. Yes! Yes! Yes!
Lunch and a show. How about that?
I'll have what she's having. I'm competing with a condiment.
sentences.ko: 그녀가 먹는 걸 나도 먹을게. 나는 조미료와 경쟁 중이야.
